{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032314571143A46B76071DE5314309"}"},"total":2675},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7267957501981770511","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"突然发现这本书可以评分了，有男主，但是男主目前还没有让我不适的情况，而且这本书是少有的，带着家人在末世生存的，并且家人团结一心，没有那种老是圣母，老是救人的那种情况，而且对于那些极品坏人直接就杀了，并没有一直拖，拖的又臭又长，很不错"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1692203319,"group_id":"7252949239498542119","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxaRVXMxytWL1wMZ+2D/rGyBQZrbsqQhilhkn7CKQDzZ","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/dac53df65da8438d97e5c4525784ab27~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796227&x-signature=yQ7mFToqP91iY0SW46xYkR%2Fk7e8%3D","user_id":"2111481893102077","user_name":"辣椒酱和番茄酱be了"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2111481893102077","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1771632606,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":27,"name":"载酒寻歌","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/novel-static/28226e4bdb6c5450ec776ade3d8ca1e9~tplv-noop.image","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/novel-static/28226e4bdb6c5450ec776ade3d8ca1e9~tplv-noop.image"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7252949239498542119","book_info":{"abstract":"（末世+丧尸+重生+空间+囤货+种田+基建+女强+团宠+团体合作，有CP，但感情线靠后。）
温浅睁开眼，重回到了末世前一个月。
此时她的家还没霸占，父母和哥哥也还没死。
她甚至还多了个无敌的备战空间，能种田能囤货，关键还能绑定家属！
于是全家总动员，开启疯狂囤货模式！
温父：欺负他女儿？来一个砍一个！不怕死的尽管来！
温母：哪怕倾家荡产，她也不要女儿在末世缺东少西！
温兄：钱他赚，活他干，这次一定要陪妹妹走到最后！
末世来临，全员恶人！
有仇报仇，有冤报冤！
（家人队友没有拖后腿的，无条件相信女主，不矫情不圣母。女主杀伐果断，砍丧尸杀敌人绝不手软。）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/1e3df1e3b1c32a3eb899702273da7d3b","author":"墨书语","author_id":"","book_id":"7252949239498542119","book_name":"重生末世，疯批女主手握无敌系统","book_short_name":"全家通关末世","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7252950348002755075","read_count":"37353","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1206395"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"589","tags":"科幻末世,种田,重生,空间,末世,女强,囤物资,基建","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4fe3c55da49fa8601fd6c54ab9d02bb1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779433031&x-signature=GrjSeXqitB4dDGvrFqdsNU5DqLM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3922691599373725","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5.694047e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032314571143A46B76071DE5314309"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":68,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5693,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":143439},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7523942480006890302","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看好看超级好看！！！
一开始看到有cp还有点犹豫，但是！这样的cp！！！我超级爱看！！！
女主性格真的超可爱啊！！！她的家人都超级好啊！！！爱她的父母，妹控的大哥！还有超级恋爱脑的男友！！！
男主恋爱脑但一点也不霸总油腻，所有事情都站在女主的角度着想。女主虽然有点小变态，杀戮机器，但其实对身边真正对她好的人都非常好，护短！
手底下那帮兵也真的超可爱的，义无反顾的跟着她。
整体剧情很精彩，很好看！也很好笑！
真的是今年到目前为止看到最好看的末世系统文了！！！
舍不得完结啊！好想能继续他们的故事！！！
真的。我超爱啊！！！
为作者大大打call
超棒的！！！","text_exts":[{"e":226,"s":222,"text":"末世系统","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9C%AB%E4%B8%96%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774249031E5314309%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227523942480006890302%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227252949239498542119%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9C%AB%E4%B8%96%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1751808333,"group_id":"7252949239498542119","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"開到荼靡花事了","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N067ObVrOxl4zkdsvXIxrBM=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/115054d80b8947418caede718d4ca006~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792397&x-signature=mtLHAVYMOAjE3KWOZ7QQAzUatYc%3D","user_id":"74941338847","user_name":"荼蘼🌸"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"74941338847","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1664110638,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7252949239498542119","book_info":{"abstract":"（末世+丧尸+重生+空间+囤货+种田+基建+女强+团宠+团体合作，有CP，但感情线靠后。）
